s: In 1990, Brent Knackert suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.510, WHIP 1.900, SO 28, WAR -0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (SEA -> BOS).
In 1996, Brent Knackert suited up for BOS as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 9.000, WHIP 2.300, SO 5, WAR 0.000. Notable context: Joined BOS.
